# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.451 — Definition

In this subchapter, “implementing agencies” means:

    (1) the department;

    (2) the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles;

    (3) the Texas Department of Insurance; and

    (4) the Department of Information Resources.

*Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 933 (H.B.3097), Sec. 2J.02, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles;
the Texas Department of Insurance; and
